templates.title: Generic App Behind Traefik
templates.name: generic-traefik-app
templates.description: Reusable stack template for a single web app published through Traefik on the external proxy network.
templates.stackfile:
services:
  {{APP_NAME}}:
    image: {{APP_IMAGE}}
    container_name: {{APP_NAME}}
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - proxy
    environment:
      TZ: {{APP_TZ}}
    volumes:
      - {{APP_NAME}}_data:/data
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.docker.network=proxy
      - traefik.http.routers.{{APP_NAME}}.rule=Host(`{{APP_HOSTNAME}}`)
      - traefik.http.routers.{{APP_NAME}}.entrypoints=web
      - traefik.http.services.{{APP_NAME}}.loadbalancer.server.port={{APP_INTERNAL_PORT}}

volumes:
  {{APP_NAME}}_data:

networks:
  proxy:
    external: true

templates.title: Generic App Plus MariaDB Behind Traefik
templates.name: generic-traefik-mariadb
templates.description: Reusable stack template for an app with a MariaDB backend and Traefik exposure.
templates.stackfile:
services:
  {{APP_NAME}}-db:
    image: mariadb:11
    container_name: {{APP_NAME}}-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MARIADB_DATABASE: {{APP_DB_NAME}}
      MARIADB_USER: {{APP_DB_USER}}
      MARIADB_PASSWORD: {{APP_DB_PASSWORD}}
      MARIADB_ROOT_PASSWORD: {{APP_DB_ROOT_PASSWORD}}
      MARIADB_USER_HOST: "%"
    volumes:
      - {{APP_NAME}}_db_data:/var/lib/mysql
    networks:
      - internal

  {{APP_NAME}}:
    image: {{APP_IMAGE}}
    container_name: {{APP_NAME}}
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - {{APP_NAME}}-db
    networks:
      - internal
      - proxy
    environment:
      TZ: {{APP_TZ}}
      WORDPRESS_DB_HOST: {{APP_NAME}}-db:3306
      WORDPRESS_DB_NAME: {{APP_DB_NAME}}
      WORDPRESS_DB_USER: {{APP_DB_USER}}
      WORDPRESS_DB_PASSWORD: {{APP_DB_PASSWORD}}
    volumes:
      - {{APP_NAME}}_app_data:/var/www/html
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.docker.network=proxy
      - traefik.http.routers.{{APP_NAME}}.rule=Host(`{{APP_HOSTNAME}}`)
      - traefik.http.routers.{{APP_NAME}}.entrypoints=web
      - traefik.http.services.{{APP_NAME}}.loadbalancer.server.port={{APP_INTERNAL_PORT}}

volumes:
  {{APP_NAME}}_db_data:
  {{APP_NAME}}_app_data:

networks:
  internal:
  proxy:
    external: true

templates.title: Static Site Behind Traefik
templates.name: static-site-traefik
templates.description: Reusable stack template for a static site or simple nginx container behind Traefik.
templates.stackfile:
services:
  {{APP_NAME}}:
    image: nginx:alpine
    container_name: {{APP_NAME}}
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - proxy
    environment:
      TZ: {{APP_TZ}}
    volumes:
      - {{APP_NAME}}_html:/usr/share/nginx/html
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.docker.network=proxy
      - traefik.http.routers.{{APP_NAME}}.rule=Host(`{{APP_HOSTNAME}}`)
      - traefik.http.routers.{{APP_NAME}}.entrypoints=web
      - traefik.http.services.{{APP_NAME}}.loadbalancer.server.port=80

volumes:
  {{APP_NAME}}_html:

networks:
  proxy:
    external: true

templates.title: Calibre Behind Traefik
templates.name: calibre-traefik
templates.description: Calibre published through Traefik with separate domain and subdomain inputs.
templates.stackfile:
services:
  {{APP_NAME}}:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/calibre:latest
    container_name: {{APP_NAME}}
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      PUID: {{APP_PUID}}
      PGID: {{APP_PGID}}
      TZ: {{APP_TZ}}
      CUSTOM_USER: {{APP_USER}}
      PASSWORD: {{APP_PASSWORD}}
    volumes:
      - {{APP_NAME}}_config:/config
      - {{APP_NAME}}_library:/books
    networks:
      - proxy
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.docker.network=proxy
      - traefik.http.routers.{{APP_NAME}}.rule=Host(`{{APP_SUBDOMAIN}}.{{APP_DOMAIN}}`)
      - traefik.http.routers.{{APP_NAME}}.entrypoints=web
      - traefik.http.services.{{APP_NAME}}.loadbalancer.server.port=8080

volumes:
  {{APP_NAME}}_config:
  {{APP_NAME}}_library:

networks:
  proxy:
    external: true

templates.title: Calibre-Web Behind Traefik
templates.name: calibreweb-traefik
templates.description: Calibre-Web published through Traefik with separate domain and subdomain inputs.
templates.stackfile:
services:
  {{APP_NAME}}:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/calibre-web:latest
    container_name: {{APP_NAME}}
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      PUID: {{APP_PUID}}
      PGID: {{APP_PGID}}
      TZ: {{APP_TZ}}
    volumes:
      - {{APP_NAME}}_config:/config
      - {{LIBRARY_VOLUME}}:/books
    networks:
      - proxy
    labels:
      - traefik.enable=true
      - traefik.docker.network=proxy
      - traefik.http.routers.{{APP_NAME}}.rule=Host(`{{APP_SUBDOMAIN}}.{{APP_DOMAIN}}`)
      - traefik.http.routers.{{APP_NAME}}.entrypoints=web
      - traefik.http.services.{{APP_NAME}}.loadbalancer.server.port=8083

volumes:
  {{APP_NAME}}_config:
  {{LIBRARY_VOLUME}}:
    external: true

networks:
  proxy:
    external: true
